<expected_gain>I WILL NOT CLAIM THE COMPOSER'S POINTS AS MINE. Retrieval does not score; it removes the ceiling that caps what the composer can score. The honest split:

WHAT RETRIEVAL OWNS AND CAN BE HELD TO:
- RECENCY: 0 -> 40+ post-2023 journal works. Our corpus has ZERO papers after 2023. cellcog mentions 2023/2024/2025 164 times; bodhi 11; cellcog is #1. Two criteria pay for exactly this ("current, high-quality academic literature"; "magnitude, SPEED, and transformative potential"). This is the largest MEASURED gap between us and #1, and it is now a solved engineering problem rather than a research risk.
- ON-TOPIC DENSITY: 17/120 -> >90%. The corpus that holds ResNet and a 1974 reading-psychology paper is replaced by one whose every member passed an LLM relevance judge against the actual question.
- CORPUS SIZE: ~45 on-topic -> 120-160 works, with a DERIVED canon at its core.
- A CONTRADICTION INDEX AND A MEASURED GAP LIST — the substrate for the adjudication prose that is cellcog's highest-scoring section, and which we currently cannot write at all, because our corpus is too thin and too off-topic to contain two papers that genuinely disagree about the same thing.

NUMBERS — STATED AS WHAT THEY ARE: ESTIMATES FROM THE BOARD'S SPREAD, NOT MEASURED EFFECTS.
- COMPREHENSIVENESS 0.4549 -> 0.55-0.58. Retrieval is the direct cause ("Depth and Representativeness of Literature Synthesized"; "Scope of Industry-Specific Analysis" via matrix saturation). +0.10 x 0.29 = +0.029. The estimate I am most confident in.
- INSIGHT 0.4238 -> 0.54-0.58. Retrieval supplies the substrate; the COMPOSER converts it. I claim perhaps half of this and will not pretend otherwise. +0.12 x 0.32 = +0.038, of which retrieval is a NECESSARY CONDITION for maybe +0.02.
- INSTRUCTION-FOLLOWING 0.4409 -> 0.55-0.57. The derived venue gate makes "only cites high-quality journal articles" (w=0.15) TRUE rather than asserted, and a truthful, specific Scope-and-Methods section is the one place retrieval provenance is judge-visible. +0.12 x 0.25 = +0.030.
- READABILITY 0.3774 -> 0.52-0.54. RETRIEVAL CONTRIBUTES NOTHING HERE. Pure composer mechanics (677w -> ~100w paragraphs, 30+ H3, a summary table, killing the meta-opener). It is also the single highest-confidence move in the whole project. +0.15 x 0.14 = +0.021.

SUM: 0.4382 + 0.029 + 0.038 + 0.030 + 0.021 = ~0.556 single compose. Best-of-3 composes adds roughly +0.008. POINT ESTIMATE ~0.564.

Against a target of ~0.556 +/- 0.019 — which is a REGRESSION ESTIMATE, not a measured number, because cellcog has no task-72 row — that is a win by LESS THAN ONE SIGMA. P(best-of-3 > 0.5578) ~ 60-65%. I land where Sol landed, and I will not dress it up any better than he did. BUT I GET THERE WITH HIS LARGEST NAMED RISK (35%, forward traversal, "an infrastructure fix, not a writing fix") STRUCTURALLY REMOVED RATHER THAN MITIGATED — AND WITH A SYSTEM THAT ALSO ANSWERS THE OTHER 99 TASKS.

THE ONE NUMBER THAT WOULD CHANGE MY ESTIMATE: the cellcog-ablation experiment (design section 6). If stripping cellcog's 2024+ citations costs it less than ~0.01, my recency thesis is worth far less than I have booked — and I want that number BEFORE we build, not after.</expected_gain>
<honest_risks>["THE LOAD-BEARING UNKNOWN IS STILL UNKNOWN, AND RETRIEVAL CANNOT ANSWER IT. We have proven the judge can SEE our scholarship; we have not proven it PAYS for it. A better corpus the judge does not price is worth zero. This is precisely why the cellcog-ablation experiment must run FIRST — it is the only proposal on the table that prices a feature before we build the machine to produce it.", "REFERENCE-LIST DEPOSIT RATE IS A HARD FLOOR ON THE VOTE. Measured: only 17 of 40 unfiltered seeds (42%) carry deposited reference lists in Crossref. Adding filter=has-references:true lifts it to ~83% — but that filter SELECTS FOR PUBLISHERS WHO DEPOSIT (Elsevier, Wiley, Springer) and silently biases the derived canon toward them, away from society journals and non-Western publishers who do not. The vote therefore measures 'most-cited BY REF-DEPOSITING PUBLISHERS', not 'most-cited'. I do not know how large this bias is and I have not measured it.", "CO-CITATION IS A POPULARITY MEASURE. It reliably finds the canon; it will systematically MISS the contrarian paper, the recent null, and the heterodox account that make a review insightful rather than merely correct. Mitigations exist (empty matrix cells drive targeted search; the contradiction index hunts disagreement) but the vote's own gradient points at CONSENSUS — the direction AWAY from the heaviest-weighted dimension. This is a real tension in my design; I have fenced it, not resolved it.", "THE CONCENTRATION THRESHOLD (~0.25) IS CALIBRATED ON n=4 RUNS I DID TONIGHT (59% / 29% / 28% / 13%). It is a heuristic with a sample size of four, not a law. There is certainly a field with a genuinely diffuse citation structure where it fires a false alarm, and it will need recalibration across more domains.", "MY 2008 FIX CHANGED TWO THINGS AT ONCE. Concentration went 13% -> 28% from SELECT-gating the seeds AND rewriting the query with field vocabulary ('subprime mortgage securitization leverage'). I did not ablate them separately. I attribute most of the gain to SELECT, but I have NOT proven that — and the query-vocabulary half depends on an LLM guessing a field's terms correctly, which is a weaker link than I would like.", "THE VOTE OPENS A FABRICATION CHANNEL THAT DID NOT EXIST BEFORE. A derived anchor is a DOI and a vote count — a paper we have never read. If vote rank alone licenses prose ('the seminal study in this field shows...'), we assert a finding we never saw, via a clever mechanism, which makes it worse and not better. Gated by 'vote rank licenses attention, never assertion' — but this is a NEW risk that I introduced, and it must be tested adversarially, not assumed closed.", "COVERAGE-MATRIX SATURATION MAY BE UNREACHABLE AND WE WILL NOT KNOW UNTIL WE RUN IT. Sol wants >=80% of 80 cells with >=2 numbered studies each — that is 128+ well-grounded studies. If the literature simply does not contain two numbered journal studies of AI's wage effects in agriculture, that cell can only ever be a DECLARED_GAP: honest, and worth something, but not the coverage the arithmetic booked.", "CROSS-DIMENSION BLEED MAY DOMINATE EVERY LEVER HERE, IN EITHER DIRECTION. The judge scores all ~25 criteria in ONE comparative call and writes the comparative analysis BEFORE the numbers. If all four dimensions land within 0.01 of each other and all are ~0.01-0.02 short, no retrieval fix reaches it (Sol's X3, and he is right to name it) — it would mean sentence-level prose quality is the binding constraint and the entire retrieval investment is necessary but not sufficient.", "EVEN IF EVERYTHING WORKS, THE MARGIN IS UNDER ONE SIGMA. Point estimate ~0.564 against a target of ~0.556 +/- 0.019 that IS NOT A MEASURED NUMBER — cellcog has no task-72 row; it is a regression estimate whose residual SD (0.0094) is exactly our smallest resolvable effect. We may beat the estimate and lose to the truth. Nothing in my design fixes that, and no plan submitted tonight can."]</honest_risks>
